description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named .NET Core Desktop that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a single windows-latest job with a matrix strategy for Debug and Release configurations. The job checks out the repository, installs .NET Core 6.0.2, sets up MSBuild, restores the application, decodes a base64-encoded signing certificate, creates an app package by building and packaging the Windows Application Packaging project, and uploads the MSIX package as a build artifact.
